title: genista hirsuta
intro: Genista hirsuta, also known as hairy broom or hairy broom shrub, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. Its health benefits include relieving coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. Genista hirsuta is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
